titles.title: Jesus Is Standing In Pilate's Hall

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus is Standing in Pilate’s Hall, Friendless forsaken betrayed by all: Hearken what meaneth the sudden call, What will you do with Jesus?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What will you do, what will you do? Neutral you cannot be Some day your heart will be asking, What will He do with me?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines:
Jesus is standing on trial still You can be false to Him if you will You can be faithful thro’ good or ill What will you do with Jesus?
Will you evade Him as Pilate tried? Or shall you choose Him whate’er betide? Vainly you struggle for Him to hide What will you do with Jesus?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Shall you like Peter, your Lord deny? Or shall you scorn from His foes to fly? Daring for Jesus to live or die What will you do with Jesus?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus, I give thee my heart, to-day Jesus, I’ll follow thee all the way Gladly obeying Him, will you say This will I do with Jesus
